memory.summary: Teammate_A is asking me to take over their part of the project this afternoon, which conflicts with my plan to finish only my own share.
I made progress on my share, but teammate_A is now urgently asking for help again.
I now understand that setting boundaries with teammate_A won't damage our trust, even though accepting their work has tightened my own deadline.
I've made solid progress on my share, yet teammate_A's persistent requests suggest they may still struggle with their part despite my boundaries.
Both my share and the teammate's dumped work missed their 19:00 deadline, leaving me with a full backlog despite my partial progress.
Teammate_A acknowledged my boundary and committed to handling their part, confirming our trust remains intact despite the missed deadline.
My 1.5-hour session advanced my progress to 0.78, yet the cumulative stress from missed deadlines and sleep debt remains high.
Teammate_A has confirmed they are taking back the extra task, which should alleviate my backlog. However, my high stress and sleep debt remain a concern despite this resolution.
My progress on the group project has increased to 0.84 after two hours of work, yet my high stress and sleep debt persist despite this advancement.
My progress reached 0.87 after one hour, but my energy is depleted and stress remains high despite the recent gains.
My project progress is now at 0.91 after 1.4 hours of work, but my energy remains depleted and stress is still high.
After 1.5 hours of work, my project progress is nearly complete at 0.95, yet I remain exhausted with zero energy and high stress.
